hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|&&|\|\||[;|])\s*gh\s+pr\s+create' || exit 0; active=$(gh api user --jq '.login' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); [ "$active" = 'dev-paul-fleischmann' ] && exit 0; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"gh pr create erfordert dev-paul-fleischmann als aktiven Account (aktuell: %s). Erst: gh auth switch --user dev-paul-fleischmann"}}' "$active"
